scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -n motor,sensor,coupled-sim,api,web -c blue,green,cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/motor-service" "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/sensor-service" "npm run serve:coupled-sim -w @real-pendulum/motor-service" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:50051 tcp:127.0.0.1:50052 && npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/control-api" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev -w web"
scripts.dev:no-kill:stack: npm run build:native -w @real-pendulum/motor-service && concurrently -n motor,sensor,coupled-sim,api,web -c blue,green,cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/motor-service" "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/sensor-service" "npm run serve:coupled-sim -w @real-pendulum/motor-service" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:50051 tcp:127.0.0.1:50052 && npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/control-api" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev -w web"
